meaning: n.临时工,做散工者,批发商,股票经纪人
examples: These are the differences between the responsibilities of a broker and a jobber.
Metric jobber drills are designed for general purpose use in a wide range of materials.
The chemical fertilizer of traditional agriculture, fertilizer and jobber can disappear.
He became a jobber, selling Sinclair fuel, whose Power-X additive was supposed to inhibit engine rust.
McQueen incorporated and found an Italian jobber that would produce a ready-to-wear line on credit.
